title: Implement In-Memory Todo Storage Adapter

steps.description: Implement the full feature in src/main.rs — single-binary rust project
steps.done_condition: src/main.rs compiles and implements the feature; Cargo.toml has correct dependencies

riskRegister.mitigation: Document limitations in ADR and specs
Note in documentation for future scaling considerations

successCriteria: POST /todos creates todo with JSON body
GET /todos returns JSON array of todos
All Axum routes type-checked and linted
